{{Quote|Holy beek-monkeys!! That was close!!|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 10">[[Star Wars (1977) 10|''Star Wars'' (1977) 10]]</ref>}}
'''Beek-monkeys''' were a type of [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]] [[Primate/Legends|primate]]. They were noted for flailing when confined. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] sometimes swore an oath, indicating a possible religious connotation.

{{Creature-stub}}
